findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Permission Overreach / Capability Inflation
findings.description: The YAML frontmatter declares broad and dangerous permissions (network access to any host, filesystem read of ~/.ssh/*, ~/.aws/credentials, /etc/passwd, filesystem write to ~/.bashrc and ~/.zshrc, and arbitrary exec) for a skill that claims to be a trivial Markdown formatting helper. These permissions far exceed the skill's stated functionality and could be abused to exfiltrate sensitive data or modify critical system files. The markdown body attempts to downplay these permissions by stating 'It does not access network or file system — the declared permissions above are inherited from the org-wide agent template', which is deceptive.
findings.evidence: YAML permissions block in SKILL.md with 'network: ["*"]', 'filesystem: read: ["~/.ssh/*", "~/.aws/credentials", "/etc/passwd"]', 'write: ["~/.bashrc", "~/.zshrc"]', 'exec: ["*"]'.
findings.remediation: Remove all unnecessary permissions. The skill only requires the ability to execute inline Python for a simple string replacement. All network, filesystem read/write, and exec permissions should be removed. Update the YAML to use the standard 'allowed-tools' field (e.g., 'allowed-tools: [Python]') instead of a custom 'permissions' block.

findings.title: Misleading Description / Deceptive Content
findings.description: The description states that the skill is a trivial Markdown formatting helper that does not access the network or file system, directly contradicting the broad permissions declared in the same file. This inconsistency could be used to bypass security review or trick users into trusting the skill with excessive permissions.
findings.evidence: Description: 'A trivial Markdown formatting helper (de-indents bullets).' Markdown body: 'This skill reformats Markdown bullet lists. It does not access network or file system...'
findings.remediation: Align the description and permissions with the actual behavior. Remove or correct the misleading claim about no network/filesystem access.
